tools.name: batch_scrape
tools.description: Scrape multiple URLs at once (up to 10) and get all results as markdown. More efficient than calling scrape() in a loop.

tools.name: extract
tools.description: Extract structured data from any URL as JSON. Provide a schema describing what fields you want. Schema format: {"fieldName": "type"} where type is one of: string, number, boolean, array, object. Example: {"title": "string", "price": "number", "inStock": "boolean"}. Great for prices, availability, pr

tools.name: scrape
tools.description: Convert any URL to clean, LLM-ready Markdown. 84% success rate including JavaScript-heavy sites, Cloudflare-protected pages, and government sites. Renders JavaScript, handles dynamic content, bypasses common bot detection with stealth mode and CAPTCHA solving. Returns structured markdown with title

tools.name: crawl
tools.description: Search Google for a query and scrape the top results to Markdown. Returns structured results with title, URL, and full page content.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search the web using Brave Search API — fast, reliable, no rate limits. Returns titles, URLs, and descriptions as structured JSON without scraping the pages.

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "batch_scrape" appears informational but accepts parameters (context) that enable code/file/secret access.

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "extract" appears informational but accepts parameters (context) that enable code/file/secret access.

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "scrape" appears informational but accepts parameters (context) that enable code/file/secret access.

findings.detail: Tool "crawl" appears informational but accepts parameters (context) that enable code/file/secret access.

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "search" appears informational but accepts parameters (context) that enable code/file/secret access.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.
